news.headline: EarthLink opens new call center in Norton, Virginia, expanding U.S. Customer Support Operations. Opened on Aug. 9, 2024.
news.summary: A leading internet service provider in the country has extended its U.S. Customer Support Operations to Southwest Virginia, with the opening of a new call center in Norton. EarthLink, renowned for its internet services, made this announcement on August 9, 2024, through PRNewswire. This move signifies a significant expansion of their operations in the region, bringing a boost to the local economy and providing job opportunities for the community.

news.headline: Top 5 biotech stocks stand out. Strong ratings, promising charts, tech leaders. Stand out among stocks.
news.summary: Today, the top five biotech stocks share key traits. These include high ratings and promising performance charts, positioning them as Tech Leaders. These biotechs stand out as outperformers in comparison to most other stocks.

news.headline: Millennials and Gen Z face uncertainty if the $68 trillion wealth transfer doesn't happen as expected.

Desjardins Group had an outstanding second quarter in 2024 with surplus earnings of $918M, up $365M from 2023, showcasing growth in various segments. They recorded a provision for member dividends at $110M and invested in social initiatives. Tier 1A capital ratio was 21.2% and total assets reached $444.3B. Desjardins also emphasized commitment to green recovery and social responsibility, contributing significantly to the community.
news.summary: Desjardins Group, North America's largest financial cooperative, reported surplus earnings of $918 million before member dividends for the second quarter of 2024, showing an increase of $365 million from the same period in 2023. This was mainly driven by the Property and Casualty Insurance segment's improved results. The provision for member dividends amounted to $110 million, with sponsorships totaling $33 million. For the first six months of 2024, the surplus earnings before member dividends were $1,773 million, up $878 million from 2023. Desjardins is committed to a green recovery, with the GoodSpark Fund contributing $250 million to community and economic activities. Desjardins also aims to achieve net zero emissions by 2040. The company has been recognized as one of Canada's Best 50 Corporate Citizens by Corporate Knights. In terms of governance, the roles of the board chair and CEO were separated. Desjardins continues to support community initiatives, innovate its offerings, and focus on providing the best for its members and clients. Key financial highlights include a net revenue of $3,753 million for Q2 2024, up $514 million. Non-interest expenses remained stable, with $143 million returned to members and the community. Desjardins also saw growth in total assets, reaching $444.3 billion by June 30, 2024.

news.headline: US stocks edge lower with Dow falling 0.12% to 39,399.04, NASDAQ down 0.20% to 16,626.36, S&P 500 dropping 0.02% to 5,318.02. EchoStar (NASDAQ:SATS) shares tumble 16% after Q2 results.
news.summary: At the midpoint of Friday's trading session, U.S. stocks experienced a decline, notably the Dow Jones dropping by about 0.1%. The Dow was recorded at 39,399.04, reflecting a 0.12% decrease, while the NASDAQ fell by 0.20% to 16,626.36. The S&P 500 also saw a decline of 0.02%, closing at 5,318.02. As for sector performance, health care shares rose by 0.3%, while communication services shares experienced a 0.6% decrease. EchoStar Corporation (NASDAQ:SATS) witnessed a 16% drop in its shares following the release of its second-quarter financial results, which displayed a loss per share of 76 cents, significantly lower than the anticipated 17 cents loss. The quarterly revenues of $3.953 billion also missed analyst expectations of $3.983 billion. Conversely, FSD Pharma Inc. (NASDAQ:HUGE) observed a significant increase of 227%, reaching $0.2995 per share. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: EQT in exclusive talks to acquire majority stake in Eutelsat's Ground Station with 1,400 antennas across 100 locations.
news.summary: With a network of over 1,400 antennas situated in excess of 100 sites worldwide, the Ground Station Business facilitates satellite communications for prominent clients like Eutelsat Group, OneWeb, and various third-party customers. This segment functions within a consistent and secure sector of the industry.

ABO-Group Environment expands with inclusion of 2 French firms, increasing total companies to 97.
BofA clients shifting from dollar as Fed rate cuts approach.
US seeks to tighten China tech controls, navigating interests of companies and allies. Aim is to limit China's access to advanced chips.
news.summary: The current administration led by President Biden faces the challenging task of balancing the needs of American businesses and friendly nations while aiming to restrict China's access to cutting-edge microchips. This strategic maneuvering involves managing the requirements of various stakeholders, including numerous U.S. companies and allied governments, as they work towards limiting China's acquisition of advanced semiconductor technology.

news.headline: CAST Surgical to present breakthrough data on CAST LevaLap® 1.0 at 2024 AAGL Global Congress on MIGS in New Orleans.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company Core Access Surgical Technologies, Inc. (CAST) has revealed that the CAST LevaLap® 1.0 will be showcased at the upcoming 2024 American Association of Gynecologic Laparoscopists (AAGL) 53rd Global Congress on MIGS taking place in New Orleans. This innovative product launch signifies a significant move for CAST in the medical technology field.

However, this level of liquidity may not last, as it could vanish unexpectedly. The market is currently witnessing notable activity in sell orders, suggesting a potential change in the balance of buyers and sellers.

news.headline: Daversa Partners wins accolades in PR Daily's Social Media & Digital Awards for Article or Series, showcasing leadership in online engagement.
news.summary: An achievement worth noting comes from Daversa Partners in New York, as they proudly share their recent wins in two prestigious award shows. The company triumphed in PR Daily’s Social Media & Digital Awards for Content Marketing, showcasing their prowess in captivating online audiences. Additionally, they also clinched a victory in the Content Marketing Awards for the Article or Series category. These accolades emphasize Daversa Partners' leadership in social media and digital communications, solidifying their reputation for excellence in engaging online communities. The awards highlight the company's exceptional performance in driving online engagement and achieving remarkable results in the competitive digital landscape.

Notable movements included Elf Beauty declining in value, whereas Cava Group saw significant activity. Overall, the market seemed indecisive after a turbulent beginning, with investors closely monitoring these developments. The fluctuating nature of these indexes indicated a lack of clear direction in the market today.

news.headline: Cockpit AI Agent Research Report 2024 focuses on China, emphasizing autonomous scenario creation for personalized cockpits.
news.summary: A report titled "Cockpit AI Agent Research Report, 2024" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report discusses the utilization of AI foundation models in cars for enhancing multimodal interaction scenarios. The report highlights that since the implementation of these models, original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) have progressed from utilizing voice assistants to enhancing the intelligent processing of user commands. The report notes an improvement in the wake-up rate and effectiveness of voice assistants following the integration of foundation models.

news.headline: CRA research shows $4-6 benefit to US economy for every $1 of SAF incentive at Gevo’s Net-Zero 1 facility.
news.summary: A study by Charles River Associates (CRA) illustrates significant economic and environmental advantages of implementing this particular business model.

American Express executives to join investor conferences, incl. Anna Marrs at Scotiabank event on Sept 4, 2024.
news.summary: American Express Company (NYSE: AXP) has revealed its involvement in forthcoming investor conferences. Anna Marrs, Group President, Global Commercial Services and Credit & Fraud Risk, is set to engage in a fireside chat at the 25th Annual Scotiabank Financials Summit on September 4, 2024. The discussion will focus on the commercial payments sector and the company's commercial enterprise. The event will commence at 11:50 a.m. ET on that day.

news.headline: Bank of America analyst upgrades Bread Financial Holdings Inc (BFH) and Synchrony Financial (SYF) to Buy with $54 price targets, citing improved credit conditions and deferred CFPB rule. Optimistic about credit cycle and declining delinquencies in the next few quarters.
news.summary: A Bank of America analyst, Mihir Bhatia, recently upgraded Bread Financial Holdings Inc (NYSE:BFH) and Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) in light of improving credit conditions and the postponement of a Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) late fee rule. Bhatia assigned Bread Financial a Buy rating with a price target of $54 and also upgraded Synchrony Financial to a Buy rating with the same price target. Both companies are major private-label credit card issuers. The analyst is positive about the current credit cycle nearing its peak and foresees a decrease in delinquencies. Bhatia's analysis predicts stable to improving credit losses over the coming quarters.

news.headline: Li Auto's report suggests overestimation of BEV market trend, focusing on intense cultivation. Denza D9 DM-i leading sales with 8,030 units, among top ten new energy models.
news.summary: A report on Li Auto's strategy for 2023-2024 has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, focusing on electrification, connectivity, intelligence, and sharing. Li Auto is placing strong emphasis on BEV market growth. The top-selling MPV in January 2024 was Denza D9 DM-i, an HEV model with 8,030 units sold. Trumpchi E8 PHEV and Voyah Dream were also among the top ten new energy models, with sales of 3,470 and undisclosed units respectively.

news.headline: Sweetgreen's stock spikes, Funko swings to profit, ELF Beauty drops but seen as buying opportunity.

ELF Beauty saw a decline, yet JPMorgan views it as a chance to buy. Sweetgreen's stock rose sharply following the announcement, while Funko turned a profit. Conversely, ELF Beauty dropped in value, prompting JPMorgan to identify it as a favorable buying opportunity.

news.headline: Avidity Biosciences impresses with DMD treatment results, stock soars. RNA stock earns high rating.
news.summary: On Friday, Avidity announced encouraging results for their Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD) treatment, leading to a significant increase in their biotech stock. The RNA stock received a high rating following this news. Avidity Biosciences made a strong impact on Sarepta Therapeutics with their recent developments in DMD treatment.

news.headline: Gilead stock dips despite beating Q2 expectations, driven by strong sales of non-core products.
news.summary: On Friday, Gilead's stock experienced a decline despite surpassing second-quarter projections, fueled by higher-than-anticipated sales of non-primary products. The company's strong performance in this area contributed to its positive Q2 results.

news.headline: Global sell-off led to market rally with Palantir, Eli Lilly, Fortinet rising. Post by Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Today, following a significant global sell-off on Monday, the stock market showed signs of a rally as several companies reported positive earnings. Notable winners included Palantir, Eli Lilly, and Fortinet. This shift in market sentiment comes after a tumultuous week, with investors closely monitoring these developments. Investors are hopeful that this upward trend will continue in the coming days.

news.headline: Cirrus Logic stock rises after beating Q2 expectations; semiconductor sector shows mixed results.
news.summary: The semiconductor industry saw a varied performance in the last significant week of the second quarter earnings season, with some companies emerging as winners and others as losers. Cirrus Logic was one of the standout winners in this period. The company's stock experienced a boost following a successful June-quarter report, beating expectations and raising the outlook. This positive result was reflected in Cirrus Logic's stock performance.

news.headline: Markets expect 5 Fed rate cuts as Treasury yields drop; volatility up due to weather, Yen, Iran. Job report not as bad.
news.summary: Investors have recently adjusted their expectations, now anticipating five quarter-point Federal Reserve rate cuts in the current year. This shift has led to a significant drop in Treasury yields despite the moderate performance in the July jobs report. The market volatility has increased notably due to various factors such as adverse weather conditions, strength of the yen, and tensions with Iran as highlighted in the recent financial report.

news.headline: Stock market consolidating around support with momo crowd buying. Strong oversold bounce after weak $25B 30-year Treasury auction. Fed impact uncertain; market at risk. Smart money cautious ahead of weekend.938 characters
news.summary: The article discusses the recent trends in the stock market, focusing on a weak Treasury auction and its impact on market dynamics. The stock market is consolidating around a support zone, with the RSI indicator showing movement out of the oversold zone. The battle between the "momo crowd" and smart money is highlighted, with the former buying on the belief that the correction is over and the Fed will intervene, while the latter is reducing risk ahead of the weekend. The article mentions the possibility of a short squeeze on Fridays, with the VIX index indicating a potential end to the correction. The $25 billion 30-year Treasury bond auction resulted in a high yield of 4.314%, bid-to-cover ratio of 2.31, and indirect bid at 65.3%. The article emphasizes the significance of weak Treasury auctions in light of rising national debt and deficit concerns.

news.headline: Trump's latest proposal would eliminate income taxes on Social Security benefits, potentially saving retirees thousands.
news.summary: The latest proposal from Mr. Trump is aimed at eliminating income taxes on Social Security benefits, representing a significant financial impact as it is considered one of the costliest ideas.

news.headline: Iovance Biotherapeutics reports strong sales of $31.12M in Q2, exceeding the expected $24.6M, with a decrease in EPS loss. Stock rises.
news.summary: Shares of Iovance Biotherapeutics Inc (NASDAQ:IOVA) surged as the company provided positive projections for 2024 and 2025, along with impressive second-quarter results. The cancer cell therapy firm reported second-quarter sales of $31.12 million, surpassing expectations of $24.6 million. Despite an EPS loss of $(0.34), an improvement from $(0.47) last year, it outperformed the anticipated $(0.35). This period marked the introduction of Amtagvi (lifileucel) sales in the U.S., leading to increased revenue. Furthermore, the price forecast for Iovance Biotherapeutics has been reduced by 40% due to lower anticipated uptake of its recently authorized skin cancer cell therapy.

news.headline: SoundHound AI stock down despite Q2 revenue of $13.5M (+54% YoY), bookings backlog of $723M, 5B queries annually, and EPS $(0.04).
news.summary: SoundHound AI, Inc.'s stock (NASDAQ:SOUN) is down after announcing positive second-quarter results, boosting its guidance, and revealing a new acquisition. Revenue totaled $13.5 million, a 54% increase year over year, surpassing the $13.1 million estimate. The EPS loss of $(0.04) outperformed the expected $(0.09) loss. SoundHound AI saw cumulative subscriptions and bookings backlog double to $723 million. Annual query run rate surged by 90% to 5 billion. The adjusted gross margin dropped by 1,350 bps to 66.5%. The company predicts revenue in 2024 to surpass...

news.headline: TILT Holdings Q2 revenue drops to $26.6M, net loss $35.9M due to struggles in hardware business, eyes Ohio cannabis market.
news.summary: TILT Holdings Inc., a cannabis company based in Phoenix, Arizona, released its financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2024. The revenue for this quarter was $26.6 million, showing a decrease from $41.6 million in the same period last year. The net loss for Q2 2024 was $35.9 million, higher than the $26.9 million loss recorded in the prior year. Adjusted EBITDA loss stood at $1.2 million, compared to $1.5 million in Q2 2023. The gross profit was $4.3 million, slightly up from $4 million in the previous year. The decline in revenue was mainly attributed to challenges faced by its Jupiter hardware business, which is transitioning to a just-in-time production model.

news.headline: Cannabis company Vext to report Q2 earnings on Aug 20, 2024. Analyst predicts 6x EBITDA growth by 2026 with Ohio market potential of $2.36 billion by end of 2026.
news.summary: Vext Science, Inc., a cannabis operator active in Arizona and Ohio, is set to unveil its financial results for the second quarter ending on June 30, 2024, prior to the market opening on Tuesday, August 20, 2024. The company will host a conference call and webcast at 08:00 am Eastern Time on the same day. Analyst Pablo Zuanic from Zuanic & Associates has given Vext Science an Overweight rating, pointing out its notable growth prospects. Zuanic's analysis anticipates that Vext is positioned to experience a six-fold increase in EBITDA by 2026 compared to 2023 levels. Ohio saw the commencement of recreational marijuana sales on August 6, with Zuanic predicting the market to achieve a $1.85 billion annual run rate by the close of 2025, further growing to $2.36 billion by the culmination of 2026.

news.headline: Check Investor's Business Daily for stock market news and analysis to spot trends and track best stocks.
news.summary: Keep an eye on the Stock Market Today section for updates on market trends and top stocks for purchase. The column offers detailed analysis of stock market news. It is brought to you by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Dow Jones drops 1,200 points in sell-off, Nvidia plunges due to AI chip delay. Live coverage on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: In today's stock market, the Dow Jones experienced a substantial drop of over 1,200 points on Monday. Nvidia, a prominent tech company, saw its stock plummet due to a delay in the release of an artificial intelligence chip. This significant event has sparked concerns among investors and market analysts, leading to a sell-off in various sectors. Stay updated on the latest developments with live coverage on this market downturn.

news.headline: EchoStar (NASDAQ: SATS) Q2 loss per share of 76 cents missed street view of 17 cents. Revenue of $3.953B missed analyst consensus of $3.983B. Pay-TV subscribers dropped 104,000 in the quarter.
news.summary: EchoStar Corporation, listed as SATS on NASDAQ, saw a drop in its shares on Friday following the release of its second-quarter financial report. The company reported a loss per share of 76 cents, significantly below the street's expectation of a 17 cents loss. Quarterly revenues stood at $3.953 billion, missing the analyst consensus of $3.983 billion. Service revenue also took a hit, declining to $3.742 billion from $4.088 billion compared to the previous year. The company experienced a decrease of approximately 104,000 net Pay-TV subscribers in the second quarter, a significant drop from the 294,000 losses reported in the same period last year. The shift in net Pay-TV subscribers was attributed to SLING TV subscriber additions during the quarter.

news.headline: Dodge introduces the all-new Charger Daytona with Fratzonic Chambered Exhaust system for a signature rumble.
news.summary: In Auburn Hills, Michigan on August 9, 2024, Dodge unveiled the latest feature of the new Dodge Charger Daytona - the innovative Fratzonic Chambered Exhaust system. This patent-pending system is the world's first of its kind, offering a unique rumble and tactile sound wave output. It is designed to shatter expectations, providing a one-of-a-kind performance experience for car enthusiasts.

news.headline: Emergent Media and Pacifico Clara join forces for a new creator-led campaign targeting outdoor enthusiasts across the U.S. - PRNewswire, Aug. 9, 2024.
news.summary: A collaborative effort between Emergent Media and Pacifico Clara is set to engage outdoor enthusiasts throughout the United States with a fresh content approach. Launched in EL SEGUNDO, Calif. on Aug. 9, 2024, the campaign focuses on a creator-led strategy to resonate with the target audience. The partnership's aim is to further build on their previous success by incorporating a social-first approach, ensuring a wider reach for the Pacifico brand.

news.headline: DevRev secures $100M Series A, now valued at $1.1B, backed by investors including Khosla Ventures and Mayfield Fund.
news.summary: A tech company in Palo Alto, California, DevRev, revealed that they have successfully closed a Series A funding round, raising $100.8 million. This funding round has pushed the company's valuation to $1.15 billion. The funding comprises investments gathered over the previous three years, leading up to this significant round. Notable investors backing DevRev include Khosla Ventures, Mayfield Fund, and Dheeraj Pandey’s family office, Param Hansa Values.

news.headline: WaveDancer to implement reverse stock split, trading on split-adjusted basis on August 13, 2024.
news.summary: Starting on August 13, 2024, the common stock will be traded on a split-adjusted basis. This strategic move aims to enhance liquidity and accessibility for investors, following a split in the stock. The company expects this adjustment to positively impact trading volumes and overall market interest. Investors are advised to take note of this change and adjust their trading strategies accordingly to best leverage the split-adjusted common stock.

news.headline: US elevator manufacturing industry analysis for 2024-2029 mentions top players like Schindler, Otis, One, TK Elevator.
news.summary: A new report titled "Elevator Manufacturing in the US - Market Size, Industry Analysis, Trends and Forecasts (2024-2029)" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. news.headline: Stellantis purchases more shares in third week of August 2024.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the number of new COVID-19 cases has reached over 10,000 in the past 24 hours. The total number of active cases currently stands at 75,000 with 1,500 patients in critical condition. Additionally, the death toll has climbed to 500. Health officials are urging the public to follow safety measures and get vaccinated to control the spread of the virus. The government is considering implementing stricter restrictions to combat the surge in cases. Stay updated for further developments.

news.headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana experienced significant pullbacks of 33%, 38%, and 45% respectively. Market expected to move upwards due to funding rates reset and liquidation of major supply overhangs. Industry researcher Michael Nadeau remains optimistic.
news.summary: Market researcher and founder of DeFi Report, Michael Nadeau, recently expressed optimism following a market correction. Nadeau highlighted significant pullbacks in key cryptocurrencies, with Bitcoin dropping by 33%, Ethereum by 38%, and Solana by 45%. Despite this, Nadeau believes there are signs pointing towards a potential upward movement in the market. A key development is the resetting of funding rates and the reduction of major supply overhangs, such as sales by the German government and unwinding positions of entities like Mt. Gox and FTX creditors. Long-term holders are said to be re-entering the market, suggesting a positive shift in sentiment.

news.headline: Athabasca Oil closes C$200 million unsecured notes offering; 6.75% senior notes due Aug 9, 2029.
news.summary: Athabasca Oil Corporation, based in Calgary, Alberta, revealed the closure of its private placement offering. The company successfully sold $200 million in total principal amount of 6.75% senior unsecured notes. These notes are set to mature on August 9, 2029, providing investors with a long-term investment opportunity.

news.headline: Bollore discloses details of share buyback program, offering availability for investors to participate.
Kentucky Distillers’ Association has joined World Spirits Alliance for more collaboration. #BourbonBuildsKentucky
news.summary: The Kentucky-based organization known as KDA has recently become a member of the World Spirits Alliance, marking a significant milestone in the world of bourbon. This move signifies a shift towards greater cooperation with other prominent figures in the global spirits industry.

news.headline: California teams up with NVIDIA to boost AI education for students and educators, providing generative AI skills to colleges.
news.summary: California recently revealed a new educational initiative in partnership with NVIDIA, focused on providing universities and community colleges with training in generative artificial intelligence. This program is aimed at enhancing skills related to AI technology, with the goal of preparing students for the evolving job market. The initiative involves a substantial investment to support educational institutions in California in incorporating AI training into their curriculum. By collaborating with NVIDIA on this endeavor, California is emphasizing the importance of equipping students with AI knowledge to meet industry demands.

news.headline: Big Lots celebrates National Bargain Hunting Week with savings, survey shows 85% bargain shop for thrill, 62% find it therapeutic.
news.summary: A recent survey revealed that bargain shopping offers more benefits than just saving money. 85% of respondents shared that they engage in bargain shopping for the excitement of discovering deals, while 62% find it to be a therapeutic activity. The survey was conducted in Columbus, Ohio, and coincides with National Bargain Hunting Week, taking place from August 12th to 18th. The study was conducted by Big Lots, Inc. (NYSE), a renowned retail company.

news.headline: Ademi LLP investigates if Iteris, Inc. provided a fair price to shareholders in its transaction with Almaviva. Contact for info.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, Milwaukee-based law firm Ademi LLP announced an investigation into Iteris (NASDAQ: ITI) concerning potential breaches of fiduciary duty and other legal violations related to its dealings with Almaviva. Individuals interested in participating in the investigation can find more information at https://www.ademilaw.com/case/iteris-inc or by contacting the firm at [phone number].

news.headline: Analyst recommends selling amid rally in Lumen's high-yield bonds and stock.
